## Plugin reference

- Description: Browser navigation controls: back / forward / reload / home buttons in the chrome bar.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Browser.NavControls` "Navigation controls" Ôćĺ `NavControls`
  - Uses: `apps/browser/shell.Browser`, `apps/browser/shell.useBrowserNav`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`
